Title: Establishes the New York reinvests in student educational supports program; repealer
Summary: Establishes the New York reinvests in student educational supports program to provide eligible students with access to responsible, affordable educational loans to supplement available federal student aid and assist with the cost of attendance and available financial assistance; defines terms; makes related provisions; repeals the New York higher education loan program.
LawCode: Rpld & add Title 1 Art 14 Part 5 §§690 - 694-b, Ed L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to establishing the New York reinvests in student educational supports program; and to repeal certain provisions of such law relating to the New York higher education loan program
